goal: Audit every running container for exposed ports and report the riskiest three.
Migrate the legacy compose stack to podman pods.

tasks.title: Inventory the compose services
tasks.description: List every service in the compose stack with its image, ports and volumes.

tasks.title: Draft the equivalent pod definitions
tasks.description: Write pod specs that reproduce the inventory from t1.

goal: Rebuild every image that has no pinned base tag.

tasks.title: Find images with a floating base tag
tasks.description: Scan local images and report any whose base is latest or unpinned.
tasks.output: 4 images use a floating base: web:latest, api:latest, worker:latest, docs:latest.

tasks.title: Pin each Containerfile to a digest
tasks.description: Rewrite the FROM line of each affected Containerfile to a digest.
tasks.output: Pinned web and api. Working through worker…

tasks.title: Rebuild and verify
tasks.description: Rebuild each pinned image and confirm it starts.

goal: Reclaim disk by pruning dangling volumes on every connection.

tasks.title: List dangling volumes
tasks.description: Report every volume with no attached container.
tasks.output: 11 dangling volumes across podman and docker, 3.4 GB total.

tasks.title: Remove the dangling volumes
tasks.description: Remove each volume reported by t1.

approvals.title: Remove volume
approvals.reason: This tool changes engine state and needs your approval.

goal: Summarise which containers restarted in the last day and why.

tasks.title: Collect restart counts
tasks.description: Report the restart count of every container.
tasks.output: Two containers restarted: api (6 times) and cache (2 times).

tasks.title: Read the logs around each restart
tasks.description: Pull logs for the restarting containers and identify the cause.
tasks.output: api exits 137 (OOM). cache restarts on a failed health check after a slow start.

synthesis: Two containers are unstable. `api` is being OOM-killed — it exits 137 under load and its memory limit is set to 256 MB; raise the limit or cap the worker pool. `cache` fails its health check during a slow cold start; its start period is shorter than the time it needs to warm up. Neither is a crash in your application code.

goal: Sync the remote registry mirror and report what changed.

tasks.title: Reach the mirror
tasks.description: Confirm the registry mirror is reachable and authenticated.

tasks.title: Pull the changed tags
tasks.description: Pull every tag that differs from the local copy.

goal: Rewrite every Containerfile to use multi-stage builds.

tasks.title: Find single-stage Containerfiles
tasks.description: List Containerfiles with only one FROM.

tasks.title: Rewrite each one
tasks.description: Convert each file to a builder + runtime stage.
